summary: Fantastic soundboard capture of a scorching show highlighted by Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain and an explosive Truckin' > The Other One > Stella Blue > Sugar Magnolia finish.
review: Both reviewers rave about this performance – the first set ignites with Shakedown Street and Diamond Blues, while the second set opens strong with Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain. The closing medley of Truckin', The Other One, Stella Blue and Sugar Magnolia is called one of the most energetic ever heard. The soundboard source is described as “fantastic,” delivering crystal‑clear audio throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are highly favorable (4 and 5 stars) and praise both the musical performance and the soundboard recording, leading to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Board copy described as fantastic; clear, crisp mix with no reported issues.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as unusually hot, second set opens strong and the closing sequence is touted as one of the most energetic ever.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil's intro into The Other One literally shook the Garden – a standout bass moment.
